hero.question: Rolex Monte Carlo Masters: Zizou Bergs vs Adrian Mannarino
hero.prob_take: The crowd is treating this as a formality at 91.5%, pricing in Bergs as a heavy favorite who should dispose of Mannarino without drama. Bergs has the ranking advantage and form, but Mannarino is a crafty left-hander who thrives on clay and has already pushed higher seeds to tiebreaks this year, making 8-9% underdog value look reasonable if you're willing to sweat it out.

daily_take.headline: Bergs at 91.5% Looks Like Free Money, But Check The Draw First
daily_take.deck: Zizou Bergs jumped 16.5 points in 24 hours on Polymarket, now priced as a near-lock against Mannarino at the Monte Carlo Masters. The move reeks of sharp money, but the draw hasn't dropped yet. Wait for draw confirmation before chasing. If Bergs faces a top-50 threat instead of a qualifier, that 91.5% is a gift.
